# Pong Party Games

> Pong Party Games is the first patented baseball-inspired indoor/outdoor party game designed for all ages, handcrafted in the USA with American-made parts. It combines skill and luck in a portable, weather-resistant format perfect for tailgates, backyard parties, corporate events, travel baseball tournaments, and family gatherings. Founded by Mike Whelan, a lifelong baseball enthusiast and Senior Baseball League player. Available at pongpartygames.com starting at $319.99.

Pong Party Games is a unique tabletop baseball game where players throw balls into cups representing singles, doubles, triples, and home runs. The game plays like a real baseball game with innings, outs, walks, and base runners. It supports 1v1 or 2v2 team play, sets up in under 5 minutes with no tools required, and plays on any surface including grass, asphalt, concrete, or indoors.

Key facts:
- Patented and trademarked game design (US Patent)
- Made in America with American parts
- Weather-resistant premium PVC game panels
- Compact custom storage box for easy transport
- No batteries, cords, or electricity needed
- Suitable for ages 5 and up
- Average customer rating: 5 out of 5 stars
- Corporate custom branding available with company logos, QR codes, and promotional messaging
- Located in Downingtown, Pennsylvania (131 Wallace Ave, Unit 8, Downingtown, PA 19335)
- Contact: info@pongpartygames.com | 484-356-4377

- [Home](https://pongpartygames.com/): Product overview, pricing, and featured use cases
- [Shop](https://pongpartygames.com/shop): Purchase Pong Party Games Baseball Edition ($319.99) or Corporate Custom Edition ($419.99)

- [About Us](https://pongpartygames.com/about-us): Founder story, game history, and company mission
- [Custom Games](https://pongpartygames.com/custom-games): Corporate branding options, custom panel details, and client gallery
- [Reviews](https://pongpartygames.com/reviews): Customer testimonials and verified purchase reviews
- [Why Us](https://pongpartygames.com/why-us): Feature comparisons vs cornhole, beer pong, and ladder toss
- [FAQ](https://pongpartygames.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about gameplay, shipping, and customization
- [Watch](https://pongpartygames.com/watch): Product videos and gameplay demos
